decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who has shown remorse and made partial restitution for embezzling $25,000. While the breach of trust is significant due to their role as an accountant, a custodial sentence serves as a deterrent while acknowledging the mitigating factors of their clean record and efforts to repay the stolen funds. Considering typical sentencing guidelines for non-violent white-collar first-time offenses of this magnitude, an eight-month period of incarceration is appropriate.
